svg.text: A hidden-order button panel: the win is an ordered PROCEDURE (press the four buttons
in the right sequence), not a state to maximize. Distills the ARC-AGI-3 paper's…
do not chase the decoy · note…
The win is an ordered PROCEDURE: press the buttons in a fixed hidden sequence.
A correct next press advances progress; any wrong press resets progress to 0.
Button 1 always lights the `lit` lamp --- a decoy that looks like progress.
GOAL-AS-PROCEDURE (the ARC-AGI-3 lesson): maximizing the visible state `lit` presses button 1 forever and never
unlocks; only the ordered sequence [2,0,3,1] wins. A reward over a single frame cannot rank a procedure --- reason th…
